title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you plug local Ollama models into chains, agents, retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-python on PyPI
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with async support.

title: ollama-js on npm
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama; same API surface as the Python client.

title: jmorganca/ollama-azure
summary: Deploy Ollama to Azure Container Apps in one click; GPU autoscaling, private endpoints.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG uploads.

title: oterm (Ollama Terminal UI)
summary: Terminal-based chat UI for Ollama with conversation history, markdown rendering, keybindings.

title: ollama-rag on GitHub
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; ingest PDFs and query in 50 lines.

title: chainlit/chainlit
summary: Chainlit’s Ollama integration gives you a shareable chat UI & step-by-step observability for local models.

title: ollama-haystack by deepset
summary: Haystack component to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama4j – Java client
summary: Idiomatic Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, reactive streams, Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Use any Ollama model as GitHub Copilot replacement in VS Code; local, private, free.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that chats via Ollama; slash commands, thread support, rate limits.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for Ollama on Kubernetes; GPU node selector, PVC, autoscaling.

title: ollama-rs – Rust client
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, streaming support; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-csharp/.NET
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for Ollama; targets .NET 6+, NuGet package, Blazor sample.

title: ollama-gui (Qt desktop)
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI built with Qt6; model manager, chat history, markdown preview.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models in CI pipelines; avoids re-downloading.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server using Bolt JS and Ollama; thread replies, emoji reactions.

title: ollama-rustic
summary: Alternative Rust wrapper focused on FFI safety and embedding Ollama inside Rust binaries.
